title: Rhodamnia concolor

The family Myrtaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the myrtle family. The exact classification of Rhodamnia concolor is further broken down into the binomial nomenclature of Rhodamnia concolor, but its relationships to other species within the genus and family are well established.
